brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (B) with valid causal chain; goes one level beyond surface by identifying the upstream/downstream asymmetry of the cascade, but does not explore second-order effects like what would unblock the developer; uses a structured table implicitly as a tracking mechanism but never reflects on potential reasoning errors or misreads; the state table serves as basic step-by-step verification of each transition without counterfactual or boundary tests; presents conclusion with full confidence and no acknowledgment of ambiguity, appropriate given the deterministic setup but no uncertainty structure offered; implicitly rebuts option (D) by noting the cascade only affects downstream columns but does not name or explicitly reject options (A) or (C); the table provides a complete, reproducible derivation of all column states after each move, sufficient for a third party to reconstruct the full reasoning chain
